recommendation: A calm, precise, trustworthy hero that faithfully inherits its brand library: one low-chroma pine accent used only where it means something, tinted neutrals (no pure black/white), a real serif-plus-grotesque-plus-mono type hierarchy, and AA contrast verified in both light and dark modes. No state gaps (the only interactive element is a navigational link), no responsive breaks, and no anti-slop hits. Note for later: when the CTA links to a real form or async flow, that surface will need the full empty/loading/error/success/disabled treatment the brand library already specifies.
assessed: Brand library (design-system.md + tokens.json) and the artifact (TesseraLanding.jsx, tessera.css, tessera.html, main.jsx). No usable render snapshot available; reconstructed the render from the mockup's own complete OKLCH styles and verified all contrast pairs numerically.
